codeReview.summary: The feature implementation matches the requested behavior: all five dashboard states render via conditional UI, the mock state toggle is visible with all options, and Start/Stop transitions are implemented. The commit includes focused tests for each state and transition.

summary: Reviewed handoff, transcript skeleton, and commit 8bd2777 for dashboard-states-and-toggle. No high-confidence actionable defects were found for the scoped requirements, so this review passes.
